raw_title: The Poverty of Moral Foundation Messaging
title_en: The Poverty of Moral Foundation Messaging
title_zh: 道德基础信息传递的贫乏
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了基于道德基础理论的政治信息传递可能存在的局限性或效果不佳的问题。研究可能分析了为什么某些道德诉求在政治沟通中未能达到预期效果，或者道德信息传递策略为何在某些情况下显得贫乏无力。
plain_summary_en: This article examines the potential limitations or ineffectiveness of political messaging based on moral foundation theory. The research likely analyzes why certain moral appeals fail to achieve desired effects in political communication, or why moral messaging strategies appear inadequate in some contexts.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中道德诉求的有效性研究，探讨道德基础理论在现实政治沟通中的应用局限和改进方向。
research_direction_en: Research on the effectiveness of moral appeals in political communication, exploring the limitations and potential improvements of applying moral foundation theory in real-world political messaging.
